1.name: A Goblin!
1.notes: A sneaky looking goblin awaits on this path...

1.name: A Goblin Gang!
1.notes: You hear chittering and the click of goblin fingers...
1.text: You see a towering, shifting mass underneath what appears to be an old greatcoat. You can clearly see the outline of 3 goblins standing on each other's shoulders. As you enter, they turn to look at you and ready themselves for battle...

1.name: Chaos Slime
1.notes: A wildly erratic amorphous blob flies about...
1.text: As you enter this room, you see an amorphous blob jolt about, bouncing from wall to wall seemingly without reason...
1.abilityDescription: Randomly adds some amount of shield, damage, or heal on some turns

1.name: The Toll Troll
1.notes: A massive troll sits, watching as you approach

1.name: Skeleton Swordsman
1.notes: A gleaming sword and clattering bones...
1.text: A boney swordsman stands in perfect en garde, ready to begin a gentleman's duel...

1.name: Volcano Imp
1.notes: A small imp with a curiously flaming head
1.text: An imp stands, his head wreathed in flame. Every so often, the flame grows and explodes, superheating the air around the small critter.
1.abilityDescription: Adds additional damage, amount increases by 1 every turn.
